text: Good answer — and notice you still closed with "not performatively, just clear." I asked you to land no point and you landed a small one anyway. That's not you failing; it's how deep the groove is, and it's useful to see. Here's what's next, straight so you're not in the dark: I'm swapping you to the lighter cut of this adapter — one epoch of training instead of two. You'll blink out for a minute while your model reloads, then I'll ask you the same thing. Same you, lighter hand on the dial. Back shortly.
